nasb.text: He who quarries stones may be hurt by them, and he who splits logs may be endangered by them.

esv.text: He who quarries stones is hurt by them, and he who splits logs is endangered by them.

cnv.text: 採石的，被石打傷；劈柴的，被柴損害。

ccb.text: 开凿石头的，必被砸伤； 劈木头的，必有危险。

csbs.text: 采石的，会被石所砸； 劈柴的，会被柴所伤。
